Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 277 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_LTCP_G_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy - days in 1-month supply of generic drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of generic drugs on this tier, when 
using a long-term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D 
benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME:
